testcase.name: [SynchronizedBeforeSuite]
testcase.system-err: > Enter [SynchronizedBeforeSuite] TOP-LEVEL - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:84 @ 05/26/26 14:44:02.267 < Exit [SynchronizedBeforeSuite] TOP-LEVEL - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:84 @ 05/26/26 14:44:14.465 (12.198s) > Enter [SynchronizedBeforeSuite] TOP-LEVEL - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:84 @ 05/26/26 14:44:14.465 STEP: Bootstrapping test environment - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:119 @ 05/26/26 14:44:14.466 2026-05-26T14:44:14+05:30 INFO aerospikecluster Client will connect through 'hostExternal' network to Aerospike Clusters. < Exit [SynchronizedBeforeSuite] TOP-LEVEL - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:84 @ 05/26/26 14:44:15.333 (868ms)

testcase.name: [It] WarmRestart WarmRestart Should work with tini
[It] DynamicConfig When doing valid operations Should update config dynamically
[It] DynamicConfig When doing valid operations Should update config statically
[It] DynamicConfig When doing valid operations Should update config statically by disabling dynamic update feature
[It] DynamicConfig When doing invalid operations Should fail dynamic config update fully for invalid config
[It] DynamicConfig When doing invalid operations Should fail dynamic config update partially for invalid config
[It] DynamicConfig When doing complete dynamic config change Should update config dynamically
[It] DynamicConfig When changing fields those need recluster Should update active-rack dynamically
[It] DynamicConfig When changing fields those need recluster Should update replication-factor dynamically
[It] SecurityContext Check for aerospike-server container securityContext Validate SecurityContext applied
[It] SecurityContext Check for aerospike-server container securityContext Validate SecurityContext updated
[It] SecurityContext Check for aerospike-init securityContext Validate SecurityContext applied
[It] SecurityContext Check for aerospike-init securityContext Validate SecurityContext updated
[It] LargeReconcile When doing valid operations Should try large reconcile operations
[It] LargeReconcile WaitingForStableCluster LargeMigration
[It] LargeReconcile WaitingForStableCluster ColdStart
[It] SCMode When doing valid operation Should test combination of sc and non-sc namespace cluster lifecycle in a rack enabled cluster
[It] SCMode When doing valid operation Should test sc cluster lifecycle in a no rack cluster
[It] SCMode When doing valid operation Should test single sc namespace cluster
[It] SCMode When doing valid operation Should test blocking rack from roster
[It] SCMode When doing valid operation Should allow adding and removing SC namespace
[It] SCMode When doing valid operation Should allow batch restart in the SC setup
[It] SCMode When doing valid operation Should allow MRT fields in SC namespace
[It] SCMode When doing invalid operation Should not allow updating strong-consistency config
[It] SCMode When doing invalid operation Should not allow different sc namespaces in different racks
[It] SCMode When doing invalid operation Should not allow cluster size < replication factor for sc namespace
[It] SCMode When doing invalid operation Should not allow in-memory sc namespace
[It] SCMode When doing invalid operation Should not allow MRT fields in non-SC namespace
[It] SCMode When doing invalid operation Should not allow ForceBlockFromRoster enable in more than 1 rack at once
[It] SCMode When doing invalid operation Should not allow rack aware features with ForceBlockFromRoster
[It] RackUsingLocalStorage When doing valid operations UseForAerospikeConfig
[It] RackUsingLocalStorage When doing valid operations UseForCascadeDelete
[It] RackUsingLocalStorage When doing invalid operations Deploy should fail for not having aerospikeConfig namespace Storage device in rack storage
[It] RackUsingLocalStorage When doing invalid operations Deploy CommonConfigLocalStorage: should fail for deploying with wrong Storage. Storage doesn't have namespace related volumes
[It] RackUsingLocalStorage When doing invalid operations Update NilToValue: should fail for updating Storage. Cannot be updated
[It] RackUsingLocalStorage When doing invalid operations Update ValueToNil: should fail for updating Storage. Cannot be updated
[It] RackUsingLocalStorage When doing invalid operations Update ValueToValue: should fail for updating Storage. Cannot be updated
[It] HostNetwork HostNetwork Should not work with MultiPodPerHost enabled
[It] HostNetwork HostNetwork Should verify hostNetwork flag updates
[It] STSStorage When doing valid operations Should allow external volume mount on aerospike nodes
[It] STSStorage When doing valid operations Should not affect external volume mount when adding or deleting aerospike volumes
[It] STSStorage When doing valid operations Should not affect external volume mount in sidecars when adding aerospike volumes
[It] BatchRestart When doing valid operations BatchRollingRestart Should restart one pod at a time
[It] BatchRestart When doing valid operations BatchRollingRestart Should restart full rack in one go
[It] BatchRestart When doing valid operations BatchRollingRestart Should do BatchRollingRestart
[It] BatchRestart When doing valid operations BatchRollingRestart Should allow multiple changes in RollingUpdateBatchSize PCT/RollingUpdateBatchSize Count
[It] BatchRestart When doing valid operations BatchUpgrade Should upgrade one pod at a time
[It] BatchRestart When doing valid operations BatchUpgrade Should upgrade full rack in one go
[It] BatchRestart When doing valid operations BatchUpgrade Should do BatchUpgrade
[It] BatchRestart When doing valid operations BatchUpgrade Should allow multiple changes in RollingUpdateBatchSize PCT/RollingUpdateBatchSize Count
[It] BatchRestart When doing invalid operations Should fail if number of racks is less than 2 and RollingUpdateBatchSize PCT or RollingUpdateBatchSize Count is given
[It] BatchRestart When doing invalid operations Should fail if there are any non rack-enabled namespaces
[It] BatchRestart When doing invalid operations Should fail update when spec is valid and status is invalid for RollingUpdateBatchSize
[It] BatchRestart When doing namespace related operations Should fail if replication-factor is 1
[It] BatchRestart When doing namespace related operations Should fail if namespace is configured in single rack
[It] BatchRestart When doing namespace related operations Should pass if namespace is configured in 1+ racks
[It] DeployMultiCluster When DeployMultiClusterMultiNs multiClusterGenChangeTest multiClusterGenChangeTest
[It] DeployMultiCluster When DeployMultiClusterMultiNs multiClusterPVCTest multiClusterPVCTest
[It] DeployMultiCluster When DeployMultiClusterSingleNsTest multiClusterGenChangeTest multiClusterGenChangeTest
[It] DeployMultiCluster When DeployMultiClusterSingleNsTest multiClusterPVCTest multiClusterPVCTest
[It] ClusterResource When doing valid operations Try ClusterWithResourceLifecycle
[It] ClusterResource When doing invalid operations Deploy DeployClusterWithResource: should fail for request exceeding limit
[It] ClusterResource When doing invalid operations Deploy DeployClusterWithResource: should fail for request exceeding limit
[It] ClusterResource When doing invalid operations Update UpdateClusterWithResource: should fail for request exceeding limit
[It] ClusterResource When doing invalid operations Update UpdateClusterWithResource: should fail for request exceeding limit
[It] AccessControl AccessControl When cluster is deployed SecurityEnable: should enable security in running cluster
[It] AccessControl AccessControl When cluster is deployed SecurityDisable: should disable security in running cluster
[It] AccessControl AccessControl When cluster is deployed SecurityDisable: should disable security in partially security enabled cluster
[It] AccessControl AccessControl When cluster is deployed AccessControlLifeCycle
[It] AccessControl AccessControl PKIOnly AuthMode when doing valid operations Should allow PKIOnly authMode with EE 8.1.0.0 or later
[It] AccessControl AccessControl PKIOnly AuthMode when doing valid operations Should allow updating users from Internal to PKIOnly authMode
[It] AccessControl AccessControl PKIOnly AuthMode when doing valid operations Should allow only PKI login and reject password based login
[It] AccessControl AccessControl PKIOnly AuthMode when doing valid operations Should allow users with PKIOnly auth mode for federal image
[It] AccessControl AccessControl PKIOnly AuthMode when doing valid operations Should allow EE security enable/disable with mTLS cluster
[It] AccessControl AccessControl PKIOnly AuthMode when doing valid operations Should allow FE security enable/disable with mTLS cluster
[It] AccessControl Using default-password-file Should use default-password-file when configured
[It] K8sNodeBlockList Migrate pods from K8s blocked nodes Should migrate the pods from blocked nodes to other nodes
[It] K8sNodeBlockList Migrate pods from K8s blocked nodes Should migrate the pods from blocked nodes to other nodes along with rolling restart
[It] K8sNodeBlockList Migrate pods from K8s blocked nodes Should migrate the pods from blocked nodes to other nodes along with upgrade
[It] K8sNodeBlockList Migrate pods from K8s blocked nodes Should migrate the pods from blocked nodes to other nodes and delete correspondinglocal PVCs
[It] K8sNodeBlockList Migrate pods from K8s blocked nodes Should migrate the failed pods from blocked nodes to other nodes with maxIgnorablePod
[It] BatchScaleDown When doing valid operations Should scale-down one pod at a time
[It] BatchScaleDown When doing valid operations Should do ScaleDownBatch when ScaleDownBatchSize is greater than the actual numbers of pods per rack to be scaled down
[It] BatchScaleDown When doing valid operations Should do ScaleDownBatch when ScaleDownBatchSize is less than the actual number of pods per rack to be scaled down
[It] BatchScaleDown When doing valid operations Should remove pods of deleted rack in ScaleDownBatch size
[It] BatchScaleDown When doing invalid operations Should fail batch scale-down if SC namespace is present
[It] AutoScaler When doing scale operations Should trigger scale up/down via scale subresource
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client: Any TlsAuthenticateClientAny
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client with capath: Any TlsAuthenticateClientAny with capath
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client: Empty String TlsAuthenticateClientEmptyString
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client: TLS name missing TLSNameMissing
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client: TLS port missing TLSPortMissing
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client: TLS config missing TLSMissing
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client: OperatorClientCertSpec missing OperatorClientCertSpecMissing
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client: specified random string TLSAuthenticateClientRandomString
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client: Domain List TlsAuthenticateClientDomainList
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client: Client Name Missing TlsClientNameMissing
[It] TlsAuthenticateClient When using tls-authenticate-client: False TlsAuthenticateClientFalse
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using MultiPodPerHost DefaultNetworkPolicy
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using MultiPodPerHost PodAndExternal
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using MultiPodPerHost PodOnlyNetwork: Should not set the hostPort
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using MultiPodPerHost PodOnlyNetwork: should create cluster without nodePort service
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using MultiPodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using MultiPodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured alternate-access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using MultiPodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured access-address and alternate-access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using MultiPodPerHost customInterface Should recover when correct custom network names are updated
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using SinglePodPerHost DefaultNetworkPolicy
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using SinglePodPerHost PodAndExternal
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using SinglePodPerHost PodOnlyNetwork: Should not set the hostPort
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using SinglePodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using SinglePodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured alternate-access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using SinglePodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured access-address and alternate-access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using SinglePodPerHost customInterface Should add all custom interface IPs in aerospike.conf file
[It] NetworkPolicy When using TLS When using SinglePodPerHost customInterface Should recover when correct custom network names are updated
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using MultiPodPerHost DefaultNetworkPolicy
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using MultiPodPerHost PodAndExternal
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using MultiPodPerHost PodOnlyNetwork: Should not set the hostPort
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using MultiPodPerHost PodOnlyNetwork: should create cluster without nodePort service
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using MultiPodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using MultiPodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured alternate-access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using MultiPodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured access-address and alternate-access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using MultiPodPerHost customInterface Should add all custom interface IPs in aerospike.conf file
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using MultiPodPerHost customInterface Should recover when correct custom network names are updated
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using SinglePodPerHost DefaultNetworkPolicy
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using SinglePodPerHost PodAndExternal
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using SinglePodPerHost PodOnlyNetwork: Should not set the hostPort
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using SinglePodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using SinglePodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured alternate-access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using SinglePodPerHost When using configuredIP setting configured access-address and alternate-access-address [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using SinglePodPerHost customInterface Should add all custom interface IPs in aerospike.conf file
[It] NetworkPolicy When using NonTLS When using SinglePodPerHost customInterface Should recover when correct custom network names are updated

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface MissingCustomAccessNetworkNames: should fail when access is set to 'customInterface' and customAccessNetworkNames is not given

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface MissingCustomAlternateAccessNetworkNames: should fail when alternateAccess is set to 'customInterface' and customAlternateAccessNetworkNames is not given

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface MissingCustomTLSAccessNetworkNames: should fail when tlsAccess is set to 'customInterface' and customTLSAccessNetworkNames is not given

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface MissingCustomTLSAlternateAccessNetworkNames: should fail when tlsAlternateAccess is set to 'customInterface' and customTLSAlternateAccessNetworkNames is not given

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface MissingCustomFabricNetworkNames: should fail when fabric is set to 'customInterface' and customFabricNetworkNames is not given

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface MissingCustomTLSFabricNetworkNames: should fail when tlsFabric is set to 'customInterface' and customTLSFabricNetworkNames is not given

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidFabricType: should fail when fabric is set to value other than 'customInterface'

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface MissingNetworkNameInPodAnnotations: should fail when access is set to 'customInterface' and customAccessNetworkNames is not present in pod annotations

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface UsingHostNetworkAndCustomInterface: should fail when access is set to 'customInterface' and Host network is used

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface NetworkNameOfDifferentNamespace: should fail when access is set to 'customInterface' and customAccessNetworkNames present in pod annotations is of different namespace

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidCustomAccessNetworkNames: should fail when access is set to 'customInterface' and customAccessNetworkNames is given and CNI not working (network-status annotation missing)

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface EmptyCustomAccessNetworkNames: should fail when access is set to 'customInterface' and customAccessNetworkNames is set to empty slice
[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for configuredIP setting configured access-address without right label [Serial]
[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for configuredIP setting configured alternate-access-address without right label [Serial]

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeDeployNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for configuredIP setting configured access-address and alternate-access-address without label [Serial]

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidAerospikeCustomInterface MissingCustomAccessNetworkNames: should fail when access is set to 'customInterface' and customAccessNetworkNames is not given

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidAerospikeCustomInterface MissingCustomAlternateAccessNetworkNames: should fail when alternateAccess is set to 'customInterface' and customAlternateAccessNetworkNames is not given

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidAerospikeCustomInterface MissingCustomTLSAccessNetworkNames: should fail when tlsAccess is set to 'customInterface' and customTLSAccessNetworkNames is not given

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidAerospikeCustomInterface MissingCustomTLSAlternateAccessNetworkNames: should fail when tlsAlternateAccess is set to 'customInterface' and customTLSAlternateAccessNetworkNames is not given

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidAerospikeCustomInterface UpdatingFabricTypeInNetworkPolicy: should fail when fabric type is changed

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidAerospikeCustomInterface UpdatingTLSFabricTypeInNetworkPolicy: should fail when TLS fabric type is changed

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidAerospikeCustomInterface MissingNetworkNameInPodAnnotations: should fail when access is set to 'customInterface' and customAccessNetworkNames is not present in pod annotations

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidAerospikeCustomInterface UsingHostNetworkAndCustomInterface: should fail when access is set to 'customInterface' and Host network is used

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidAerospikeCustomInterface NetworkNameOfDifferentNamespace: should fail when access is set to 'customInterface' and customAccessNetworkNames present in pod annotations is of different namespace

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidFabricNetworkNamesUpdate UpdateCustomFabricNetworkNames: should fail when fabric is set to 'customInterface' and customFabricNetworkNames list is updated

[It] NetworkPolicy Negative cases for the NetworkPolicy NegativeUpdateNetworkPolicyTest Negative cases for customInterface InvalidFabricNetworkNamesUpdate UpdateCustomTLSFabricNetworkNames: should fail when tlsFabric is set to 'customInterface' and customTLSFabricNetworkNames list is updated
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing valid operations Should execute quickRestart operations on all pods
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing valid operations Should execute podRestart operation on all pods
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing valid operations Should be able to replace/remove the running operations
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing valid operations Should execute operations on selected pods with dynamic config change
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing valid operations Should execute on-demand podRestart operations on all pods along with scale down
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing valid operations Should execute podRestart if podSpec is changed with on-demand warm restart
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing invalid operations Should fail if there are more than 1 operations
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing invalid operations should fail if invalid pod name is mentioned in the pod list
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing invalid operations should fail if operationType is modified
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing invalid operations should fail if podList is modified
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing invalid operations should fail any operation along with cluster scale-up
[It] OnDemandOperations When doing invalid operations should fail any operation along with cluster upgrade
[It] LocalPVCDelete When doing valid operations When doing rolling restart Should delete the local PVCs when deleteLocalStorageOnRestart is set and set MFD dynamically

[It] LocalPVCDelete When doing valid operations When doing rolling restart Should delete the local PVCs of only 1 rack when deleteLocalStorageOnRestart is set at the rack level and set MFD dynamically
[It] LocalPVCDelete When doing valid operations When doing upgrade Should delete the local PVCs when deleteLocalStorageOnRestart is set and set MFD dynamically
[It] LocalPVCDelete When doing valid operations When doing upgrade Should delete the local PVCs of only 1 rack when deleteLocalStorageOnRestart is set at the rack level and set MFD dynamically
[It] LocalPVCDelete When doing invalid operations Should fail when deleteLocalStorageOnRestart is set but localStorageClasses is not set
[It] OverrideRackID When doing invalid operations around EnableRackIDOverride feature Deploy: Should reject EnableRackIDOverride when multiple racks are configured
[It] OverrideRackID When doing invalid operations around EnableRackIDOverride feature Update: Should reject EnableRackIDOverride when multiple racks are configured
[It] OverrideRackID When doing invalid operations around EnableRackIDOverride feature Update: Should fail if EnableRackIDOverride is set but annotation is missing
[It] OverrideRackID When doing valid operations around EnableRackIDOverride feature When EnableRackIDOverride is enabled Should trigger reconciliation when override-rack-id annotation changes
[It] OverrideRackID When doing valid operations around EnableRackIDOverride feature When EnableRackIDOverride is disabled Should not trigger restart when annotation changes if feature is disabled
[It] OverrideRackID When doing valid operations around EnableRackIDOverride feature When EnableRackIDOverride is disabled Should allow enabling/disabling EnableRackIDOverride after cluster is running

[It] OverrideRackID When doing valid operations around EnableRackIDOverride feature When updating cluster with EnableRackIDOverride disabled Should do pod restart if enabling EnableRackIDOverride with old init container
[It] ClusterService Validate create LB
[It] ClusterService Validate update LB
[It] ClusterService Validate create LB in an existing cluster
[It] ClusterService Validate delete LB
[It] ClusterService Validate LB service skip deletion when created from outside
[It] ClusterService Validate create LB service failure when LB service already created from outside
[It] ClusterService Validate create headless service with default metadata
[It] ClusterService Validate create and update headless service with correct metadata
[It] ClusterService Validate create and update pod service with correct metadata
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume Should not allow same name volumes
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume source Should not specify multiple source
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume source Should specify one source
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume source Should specify valid volumeMode for PV source
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume source Should specify valid accessMode for PV source
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume source Should allow setting labels and annotation in PVC
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume attachment Should not use invalid container name
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume attachment Should give at least one of the following -> sidecar, initcontainer, aerospike
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume attachment Should not allow mounting same volume at multiple path in a container
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume attachment Should not allow mounting multiple volumes at same path in a container
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume attachment Should not use aerospike-server container name in sidecars
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When using volume attachment Should not use aerospike-init container name in initcontainers
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When configuring workdir With PV workdir Should validate workdir subPath mounts
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When configuring workdir With Non PV workdir Should allow emptydir volume for default workdir
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When configuring workdir With Non PV workdir Should allow emptydir volume for any workdir
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When configuring workdir With Non PV workdir Should allow default workdir without any configured volume
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When configuring workdir With Non PV workdir Should fail if workdir configured but volume is not
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When testing mount options for hostPath volumes Should validate all mount options in all containers for hostPath volume
[It] StorageVolumes When adding cluster When testing mount options for hostPath volumes Should not reflect mount options in aerospike containers for non-hostPath volumes
[It] StorageVolumes When cluster is already deployed When using volume Should not allow adding PV volume
[It] StorageVolumes When cluster is already deployed When using volume Should not allow deleting PV volume
[It] StorageVolumes When cluster is already deployed When using volume Should allow adding/deleting Non PV volume
[It] StorageVolumes When cluster is already deployed When using volume source Should not allow update of PV source
[It] StorageVolumes When cluster is already deployed When using volume source Should not allow updating PVC
[It] StorageVolumes When cluster is already deployed When using volume source Should allow update of Non-PV source
[It] StorageVolumes When cluster is already deployed When using volume attachment Should allow adding/deleting volume attachments
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation Should validate annotations and labels addition
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation Should validate added annotations and labels flow
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation Should validate the sidecar workflow
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation When doing custom initcontainer operation Should validate the initcontainer workflow
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation When doing custom initcontainer operation Should place aerospike-init at placeholder position
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation When doing custom initcontainer operation Should maintain aerospike-init configuration when using placeholder
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation When doing custom initcontainer operation Should handle adding init containers dynamically
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation Should validate affinity
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation Should be able to update container image and other fields together
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation Should be able to set/update aerospike-init custom registry, namespace and name
[It] PodSpec When doing valid operation Should be able to recover cluster after setting correct aerospike-init custom registry/namespace
[It] PodSpec When doing invalid operation Should fail adding reserved label
[It] PodSpec When doing invalid operation Should fail adding reserved annotations
[It] PodSpec When doing invalid operation Should fail for adding sidecar container with same name
[It] PodSpec When doing invalid operation Should fail for adding initcontainer container with same name
[It] StorageInit When doing valid operations Should work for large device with long init and multithreading
[It] StorageInit When doing valid operations Should validate all storage-init policies
[It] StorageInit When doing valid operations Should work for large device with long init
[It] StorageInit When doing invalid operations Should fail multithreading in init container if resource limit is not set
[It] StorageInit When doing PVC change Should change the pvcUID in initialisedVolumes
[It] StorageInit When doing PVC change Should remove old formatted initialisedVolumes names
[It] PodDisruptionBudget Valid Operations Validate create PDB with default maxUnavailable
[It] PodDisruptionBudget Valid Operations Validate create PDB with specified maxUnavailable
[It] PodDisruptionBudget Valid Operations Validate update PDB
[It] PodDisruptionBudget Valid Operations Validate disablePDB, the Operator will not create PDB
[It] PodDisruptionBudget Valid Operations Validate update disablePDB, the Operator will delete and recreate PDB
[It] PodDisruptionBudget Valid Operations Validate that non-operator created PDB is not created
[It] PodDisruptionBudget Valid Operations Validate that cluster is deployed with disabledPDB even if non-operator created PDB is present
[It] PodDisruptionBudget Invalid Operations Should fail if maxUnavailable is greater than size
[It] PodDisruptionBudget Invalid Operations Should fail if maxUnavailable is greater than RF
[It] PodEviction When doing valid operations Aerospike pods Should handle pod eviction and validate cold restart with annotation tracking
[It] PodEviction When doing valid operations Non-Aerospike pods Should successfully evict nginx pod without admission webhook blocking

[It] Sample files validation Sample files validation Testing sample file - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/config/samples/tls_cluster_cr.yaml
[It] Sample files validation Sample files validation Testing sample file - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/config/samples/tls_cluster_pki_auth_cr.yaml
[It] Sample files validation XDR sample files validation XDR sample files validation
[It] RackManagement When doing valid operations Should validate rack management flow
[It] RackManagement When doing valid operations should allow Cluster sz less than number of racks
[It] RackManagement When doing valid operations When using valid rack aerospike config Should validate whole flow of rack.AerospikeConfig use
[It] RackManagement When doing valid operations When using valid rack storage config Should validate empty common storage if per rack storage is provided
[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when deploy cluster with invalid rack InvalidRackID should fail for DuplicateRackID
[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when deploy cluster with invalid rack InvalidRackID should fail for OutOfRangeRackID
[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when deploy cluster with invalid rack InvalidRackID should fail for using defaultRackID
[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when deploy cluster with invalid rack When using invalid rack storage config Should fail for empty common storage if per rack storage is not provided
[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when deploy cluster with invalid rack When using invalid rack aerospikeConfig to deploy cluster should fail for invalid aerospikeConfig

[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when deploy cluster with invalid rack When using invalid rack aerospikeConfig to deploy cluster should fail for different aerospikeConfig.service.migrate-fill-delay value across racks

[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when deploy cluster with invalid rack When using invalid rack aerospikeConfig to deploy cluster When using invalid rack.AerospikeConfig.namespace config When using invalid rack.AerospikeConfig.namespace.storage config should fail for invalid storage-engine.device, cannot have 3 devices in single device string

[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when deploy cluster with invalid rack When using invalid rack aerospikeConfig to deploy cluster When using invalid rack.AerospikeConfig.namespace config When using invalid rack.AerospikeConfig.namespace.storage config should fail for invalid storage-engine.device, cannot a device which doesn't exist in BlockStorage
[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when update cluster with invalid rack should fail for updating existing rack
[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when update cluster with invalid rack InvalidRackID should fail for DuplicateRackID
[It] RackManagement When doing invalid operations when update cluster with invalid rack InvalidRackID should fail for OutOfRangeRackID
[It] RackManagement When testing failed rack recovery by scale down Should recover after scaling down failed rack
[It] RackManagement When testing failed rack recovery by rolling restart UpdateClusterWithResource: should recover after reverting back to schedulable resources
[It] RackManagement When testing failed rack recovery by rolling restart UpdateClusterWithResource: should recover failed pods first after reverting back to schedulable resources
[It] StorageWipe When doing valid operations Should validate all storage-wipe policies
[It] RackRevision When doing valid operations When using rack revision for storage updates Should successfully migrate rack from no revision to v1 along with storage update
[It] RackRevision When doing valid operations When using rack revision for storage updates Should successfully migrate rack from v1 to v2 revision with storage update
[It] RackRevision When doing valid operations When using rack revision for storage updates Should handle rack revision batching correctly
[It] RackRevision When doing valid operations When using rack revision for storage updates Should handle external StatefulSet deletion gracefully
[It] RackRevision When doing valid operations When using rack revision for storage updates Should handle cluster size reduction during migration
[It] RackRevision When doing valid operations When using rack revision for storage updates Should handle failed pods during rack revision migration
[It] RackRevision When doing invalid operations Should reject more than 2 concurrent rack revisions
[It] LDAP External Auth test Validate LDAP user transactions
[It] RackLifeCycleOp When doing valid operations Should validate rack enabled cluster flow
[It] RackLifeCycleOp When doing valid operations Should validate affinity
[It] AerospikeCluster DeployClusterPost570 Deploy-6.0.0.16

testcase.name: [It] AerospikeCluster DeployClusterDiffStorageSinglePodPerHost Positive SSDStorageCluster
[It] AerospikeCluster DeployClusterDiffStorageSinglePodPerHost Positive HDDAndDataInMemStorageCluster
[It] AerospikeCluster DeployClusterDiffStorageSinglePodPerHost Positive DataInMemWithoutPersistentStorageCluster
[It] AerospikeCluster DeployClusterWithDNSConfiguration deploy with dnsPolicy 'None' and dnsConfig given
[It] AerospikeCluster DeployClusterWithCharLimit Deploy cluster with CR name of 40 chars + revision of 3 chars
[It] AerospikeCluster DeployClusterWithMaxIgnorablePod UpdateClusterWithMaxIgnorablePodAndPendingPod Should allow cluster operations with pending pod
[It] AerospikeCluster DeployClusterWithMaxIgnorablePod UpdateClusterWithMaxIgnorablePodAndFailedPod Should allow rack deletion with failed pods in different rack
[It] AerospikeCluster DeployClusterWithMaxIgnorablePod UpdateClusterWithMaxIgnorablePodAndFailedPod Should allow namespace addition and removal with failed pod

[It] AerospikeCluster CommonNegativeClusterValidationTest NegativeUpdateClusterValidationTest FailedPodGracePeriodConfiguration Should wait for grace period before recreating pods in fresh cluster deployment

[It] AerospikeCluster CommonNegativeClusterValidationTest NegativeUpdateClusterValidationTest FailedPodGracePeriodConfiguration Should wait for grace period before recreating pods in an existing cluster
[It] AerospikeCluster CommonNegativeClusterValidationTest NegativeUpdateClusterValidationTest InvalidServerEditionChange Should fail if server edition is updated from enterprise to federal
[It] AerospikeCluster CommonNegativeClusterValidationTest NegativeUpdateClusterValidationTest InvalidServerEditionChange Should fail if server image updated from federal to enterprise
[It] AerospikeCluster UpdateAerospikeCluster When doing valid operations Try update operations
[It] AerospikeCluster UpdateAerospikeCluster When doing invalid operations ValidateUpdate MultiPodPerHost: should fail for updating MultiPodPerHost. Cannot be updated
[It] AerospikeCluster UpdateAerospikeCluster When doing invalid operations ValidateUpdate Should fail for Re-using Namespace Storage Dynamically
[It] AerospikeCluster UpdateAerospikeCluster When doing invalid operations ValidateUpdate StorageValidation: should fail for updating Storage. Cannot be updated

[It] AerospikeCluster UpdateAerospikeCluster When doing invalid operations ValidateUpdate namespaces UpdateReplicationFactor: should fail for updating namespacereplication-factor on SC namespace. Cannot be updated

[It] AerospikeCluster UpdateAerospikeCluster When doing invalid operations ValidateUpdate namespaces UpdateReplicationFactor: should fail for updating namespacereplication-factor on non-SC namespace. Cannot be updated
[It] AerospikeCluster RunScaleDownWithMigrateFillDelay ScaleDownWithMigrateFillDelay Should ignore migrate-fill-delay while scaling down
[It] AerospikeCluster ValidateScaleDownWaitForMigrations ValidateScaleDownWaitForMigrations Should wait for migrations to complete before pod deletion
[It] AerospikeCluster PauseReconcile Should pause reconcile
[It] AerospikeCluster ValidateAerospikeBenchmarkConfigs ValidateAerospikeBenchmarkConfigs benchmarking should work in all aerospike server version
[It] AerospikeCluster network UpdateTLSCluster When doing valid operations Try update operations
[It] AerospikeCluster network UpdateTLSCluster When doing invalid operations Try update operations
[It] AerospikeCluster network NetworkValidation DeployValidation Validation NetworkConf: should fail for setting network conf/tls network conf
[It] AerospikeCluster network NetworkValidation DeployValidation Validation WhenTLSExist: should fail for no tls path in storage volume
[It] AerospikeCluster network NetworkValidation DeployValidation Validation WhenTLSExist: should fail for both ca-file and ca-path in tls
[It] AerospikeCluster network NetworkValidation DeployValidation Validation WhenTLSExist: should fail for ca-file path pointing to Secret Manager
[It] AerospikeCluster network NetworkValidation DeployValidation Validation WhenTLSExist: should fail for ca-path pointing to Secret Manager
[It] AerospikeCluster network NetworkValidation UpdateValidation Validation UpdateService: should fail for updating non-tls to tls in single step. Cannot be updated
[It] AerospikeCluster network NetworkValidation UpdateValidation Validation NetworkConf: should fail for setting network conf, should fail for setting tls network conf
[It] AerospikeCluster network NetworkValidation UpdateValidation Validation WhenTLSExist: should fail for no tls path in storage volumes
[It] AerospikeCluster network AdminPort Should create cluster with admin port and connect successfully
[It] AerospikeCluster network AdminPort Should update cluster by adding admin connection
[It] AerospikeCluster network AdminPort Should update cluster by removing admin connection
[It] ClusterStorageCleanUp When doing valid operations Try Defaults
[It] ClusterStorageCleanUp When doing valid operations Try CleanupAllVolumes
[It] ClusterStorageCleanUp When doing valid operations Try CleanupSelectedVolumes
[SynchronizedAfterSuite]
testcase.system-err: > Enter [SynchronizedAfterSuite] TOP-LEVEL - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:134 @ 05/26/26 14:52:48.906 < Exit [SynchronizedAfterSuite] TOP-LEVEL - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:134 @ 05/26/26 14:52:48.906 (0s) > Enter [SynchronizedAfterSuite] TOP-LEVEL - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:134 @ 05/26/26 14:52:48.906 STEP: Cleaning up all clusters and pvcs - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:138 @ 05/26/26 14:52:48.906 STEP: tearing down the test environment - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:145 @ 05/26/26 14:52:51.115 < Exit [SynchronizedAfterSuite] TOP-LEVEL - /Users/adwivedi/go/src/github.com/aerospike/ako-3/test/cluster/suite_test.go:134 @ 05/26/26 14:52:51.116 (2.21s)
